# /fdd

> Assemble or extend the project's d365-ce **domain** FDD (per [ADR-0006](../../../design/adr/0006-doc-scope-domain-vs-feature.md)) from the multi-file sub-platform pack (per [ADR-0005](../../../design/adr/0005-d365-ce-multi-file-sub-platform.md)) for the current feature. Inline self-check runs against [templates/checklists/fdd-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/fdd-review.checklist.md) per [ADR-0001](../../../design/adr/0001-review-scope-spec-only.md).

## Usage

```
/fdd [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--mockups full|skip]
```

- `--mockups full` (default) regenerates HTML form mockups for any new entity sections.
- `--mockups skip` defers mockup generation (useful for fast iteration; rerun later without `--mockups skip`).

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/spec.md` (must exist; gate `SPEC_APPROVED` must be APPROVED)
- `project.config.yaml` → sub-platforms in scope: `modelDriven` / `canvas` / `powerPages` / `pcf` / `powerAutomate`
- [templates/fdd/_index.template.md](../../templates/fdd/_index.template.md) (SW Phoenix shape, 12 sections, R19 A1-A15)
- [templates/fdd/model-driven.template.md](../../templates/fdd/model-driven.template.md), [canvas](../../templates/fdd/canvas.template.md), [power-pages](../../templates/fdd/power-pages.template.md), [pcf](../../templates/fdd/pcf.template.md), [power-automate](../../templates/fdd/power-automate.template.md)
- [templates/fdd-helpers/form-mockup-generator.prompt.md](../../templates/fdd-helpers/form-mockup-generator.prompt.md) (form mockup generation)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/fdd.md` (when it already exists — additive merge)

## Execution flow (assembly)

1. Resolve project. Read `project.config.yaml` for in-scope sub-platforms. Read [agents.yaml](../../../agents.yaml) for `docScope.fdd = domain`.
2. Resolve target: `projects/{p}/d365-ce/fdd.md`. If absent, bootstrap from `templates/fdd/_index.template.md`.
3. Pull each in-scope sub-platform pack and merge it into the `_index` slot for §4 (UI / functional design) per [agents/d365-ce.md § /fdd assembly flow](../../../design/agents/d365-ce.md).
4. For the current feature:
   - **Structural** sections (new process, new scenario, new entity, new sub-platform area): append a self-contained sub-section with `<!-- feature-id: {slug} -->` marker at top.
   - **Table-shaped** sections (validation rules, views, security roles, FLS profiles, OOB-first decisions, NFR mapping): append rows with hidden `feature-id` column.
5. Update cross-doc sections: §1.5 Open Questions roll-up; §10 Handoffs; Appendix B User-Story Reference.
6. For each entity in §4.1 Forms Wireframes (model-driven only), invoke the form-mockup generator helper to produce `projects/{p}/d365-ce/fdd-assets/mockups/{entity-form}.html` (idempotent — skips entities whose form spec hasn't changed). Link from §4.5.
7. Regenerate TOC + global traceability matrix (§10).
8. **Inline self-check**: evaluate each category in `fdd-review.checklist.md`. Append a `## Quality self-check` appendix with findings table. BLOCKER findings **fail the write** (per ADR-0001) — no partial doc emitted. REQUIREDs must have acceptance notes inline.
9. Run `doc_lint` MCP tool on the resulting FDD; any BLOCKER aborts.
10. Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `FDD_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/fdd.md` (extended in place — append-only at the section/row level for already-tagged features; rewrite for the current feature's own sections)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/fdd-assets/mockups/{entity-form}.html` (one per entity in §4.1)
- `.workflow.json` updated

## Concurrency

Per [agents/d365-ce.md § Concurrency](../../../design/agents/d365-ce.md): disjoint section-blocks across features don't conflict; appended rows don't conflict. If two features touch the same section, `doc_lint` flags it and the user resolves — no automatic three-way merge.
